mechanism: ECB political constraints on QT and BoJ market dominance (>50% JGB holdings) mean duration absorption stress concentrates disproportionately in USD-denominated markets. The Fed's comparatively unconstrained normalization path loads the global adjustment onto US Treasury markets.
regime_dependence: Current regime where Fed is furthest along in QT. Would reverse if ECB faces peripheral stress requiring re-expansion, or if BoJ normalization creates a functioning JGB market that absorbs global duration demand.
